title: EvidencePacket
description: Auditable record produced when a governed action completes. An action is not considered done until its EvidencePacket exists. GAIL OS canonical source.

EvidenceResult.description: Outcome classification for a governed action.

ExecutionMode.description: Execution mode under which the action ran. 'live' requires allow_live=True and is outside the current A1 local no-network boundary.

evidence_id.description: Unique evidence identifier. Must use the 'evidence-' prefix.

cns_trace_id.description: Shared CNS trace thread. Must not encode tenant, customer, file, secret, or provider identifiers.

mission_id.description: Parent mission identifier. Must use the 'mission-' prefix.

action_id.description: Action this evidence records. Must use the 'action-' prefix.

actor.description: Human or system that performed the action.

authority_basis.description: Authority under which the action was permitted (e.g. 'R0 — local dry-run').

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the evidence packet was created.

envelope_id.description: AuthorityEnvelope reference if one governed this action. Must use the 'env-' prefix when present.

rollback_note.description: How to reverse this action if needed.

outcome_summary.description: Human-readable summary of the action outcome.
